The international diplomatic and military community accelerated its massive, highly coordinated emergency response to the horrific flooding in Mozambique. This massive, controversial legislative push fiercely divided the Democratic Party, pitting the aggressive, pro-globalization tech and agriculture sectors against massive, traditional labor unions and human rights activists who deeply feared the massive offshoring of American manufacturing.

The Indian political and massive state bureaucratic apparatus heavily mobilized to aggressively combat the catastrophic, unprecedented drought devastating western and southern India. In Andhra Pradesh, the state government aggressively utilized the absolute end of the month to conduct massive, internal administrative reviews of the devastating drought crisis. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On April 30, 1975, the incredibly massive, incredibly brutal, and deeply divisive Vietnam War officially and absolutely concluded with the Fall of Saigon. Heavily armed North Vietnamese and Viet Cong forces aggressively captured the South Vietnamese capital. The massive, chaotic evacuation of the final American personnel via helicopter from the US Embassy roof heavily symbolized the absolute, total collapse of US military efforts in Southeast Asia, aggressively reunifying the nation under communist control and deeply traumatizing the American psyche.

On April 30, 1945, as the massive, devastating Battle of Berlin raged above him, Adolf Hitler, the absolute, highly dictatorial leader of Nazi Germany, officially committed suicide in his subterranean Führerbunker alongside his new wife, Eva Braun. Facing the absolute, imminent destruction of his "Thousand Year Reich" by the advancing Soviet Red Army, his massive, highly calculated suicide heavily ensured the absolute, total collapse of the brutal Nazi regime and aggressively concluded the European Theatre of World War II days later.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On April 30, 1908, Khudiram Bose, an incredibly young, massive, and deeply fearless teenage revolutionary of the Anushilan Samiti, aggressively threw a massive bomb at a carriage in Muzaffarpur, Bihar. Heavily intending to aggressively assassinate the highly oppressive British magistrate Douglas Kingsford, the bomb tragically killed two innocent British women instead. Bose was captured and aggressively executed by hanging at the age of 18, instantly becoming a massive, highly venerated and absolute, foundational martyr of the militant Indian independence struggle.

On April 30, 1870, Dadasaheb Phalke, universally and massively revered as the absolute "Father of Indian Cinema," was born in Maharashtra. An incredibly brilliant visionary, he aggressively utilized his massive technical skills and immense passion to produce, direct, and heavily distribute *Raja Harishchandra* in 1913, the absolute, very first full-length Indian feature film. His massive, uncompromising dedication to indigenous filmmaking fundamentally and heavily birthed the most massive, prolific cinematic industry in the entire world.
